stepAnswer: Normal distribution centered at the population mean
stepBody: Cyrus takes many large random samples with replacement from the population, with the goal of generating an empirical distribution of the sample mean. What shape do you expect this distribution to have? Which value will it be centered around?
choices: Uniform distribution centered at the sample median
Skewed distribution centered at the population median
Normal distribution centered at the population mean
Bimodal distribution centered at the sample mean
